changes: Socket.IO polling-only path for Werkzeug/threading and frontend clients disabled websocket upgrades.
/api/agent/session and socket session start return before sync_runtime_graph(save_state=True); sync runs in background.
Added preparing session/project state semantics; running is reserved for a real worker PID/process.
Runtime-truth detects running_without_pid, blocked_state_with_pending_queue, and dead worker PID.
Zombie release backs up project_state/task_queue, requeues active tasks to pending, records failure and checkpoint.
Internal observer-status/preflight timeout is non-fatal and emits terminal output before internal tool checks.
Removed unused duplicated _prepare_control_plane_session helper after consolidating background prepare in _run_control_plane_session.
